/bin/zsh -lc "docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml exec -T backend python - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import datetime, timezone
from uuid import uuid4

from app.db import (
    BeatSheet,
    CharacterSheet,
    CompositionJob,
    CompositionJobKind,
    JobStatus,
    Pitch,
    StoryBrief,
    StoryOutline,
    StorySession,
    StorySetup,
    Genre,
    ToneProfile,
)
from app.db.session import get_session_factory
from app.models import WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState
from app.services import CompositionJobService
from app.services.session_hydration import SessionHydrationService
from app.services.sessions import SessionService

SessionLocal = get_session_factory()


def create_story_session(title: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
    suffix = uuid4().hex[:8]
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)

    with SessionLocal() as session:
        service = SessionService(session)
        genre = Genre(
            slug=f\"visual-qa-quest-{suffix}\",
            label=\"Quest Fantasy\",
            description=\"A gentle harbor adventure for browser QA.\",
        )
        tone = ToneProfile(
            genre=genre,
            slug=f\"visual-qa-tone-{suffix}\",
            label=\"Hushed Wonder\",
            description=\"Soft and luminous.\",
        )
        session.add_all([genre, tone])
        session.flush()

        snapshot = service.create_session(working_title=title)
        story_session = session.get(StorySession, snapshot.id)
        assert story_session is not None
        story_session.selected_genre = genre
        story_session.selected_tone_profile = tone
        session.flush()

        for stage in (
            WorkflowStage.GENRE,
            WorkflowStage.TONE,
            WorkflowStage.BRIEF,
            WorkflowStage.PITCHES,
            WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,
            WorkflowStage.BEATS,
            WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,
        ):
            service.update_stage_state(
                snapshot.id,
                stage=stage,
                status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
            )

        brief = StoryBrief(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            revision_number=1,
            raw_brief=\"A harbor fox follows a silver clue and returns home calm.\",
            normalized_summary=\"A bedtime harbor mystery with gentle emotional repair.\",
            planning_notes=\"Keep the midpoint safe and sleepy.\",
            is_active=True,
            accepted_at=now,
        )
        session.add(brief)
        session.flush()

        pitch = Pitch(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            story_brief_id=brief.id,
            generation_key=f\"visual-qa-{suffix}\",
            pitch_index=1,
            title=\"The Silver Bell Buoy\",
            logline=\"A harbor fox follows a bell across moonlit water.\",
            is_selected=True,
            accepted_at=now,
        )
        session.add(pitch)
        session.flush()

        character_sheet = CharacterSheet(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            pitch_id=pitch.id,
            revision_number=1,
            title=\"Mira and the Bell\",
            protagonist_name=\"Mira\",
            is_selected=True,
            accepted_at=now,
        )
        session.add(character_sheet)
        session.flush()

        beat_sheet = BeatSheet(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            character_sheet_id=character_sheet.id,
            revision_number=1,
            summary=\"A soft Save-the-Cat arc.\",
            beats=[
                {
                    \"key\": \"opening_image\",
                    \"label\": \"Opening Image\",
                    \"order\": 1,
                    \"summary\": \"Mira watches the harbor settle under soft moonlight.\",
                    \"emotional_intent\": \"Begin in stillness and wonder.\",
                },
                {
                    \"key\": \"catalyst\",
                    \"label\": \"Catalyst\",
                    \"order\": 2,
                    \"summary\": \"A bell buoy drifts away from the dock and asks for help.\",
                    \"emotional_intent\": \"Introduce a gentle problem.\",
                },
                {
                    \"key\": \"midpoint\",
                    \"label\": \"Midpoint\",
                    \"order\": 3,
                    \"summary\": \"Mira finds the hidden cove where the bell belongs.\",
                    \"emotional_intent\": \"Lift wonder while keeping the surprise soft.\",
                },
                {
                    \"key\": \"finale\",
                    \"label\": \"Finale\",
                    \"order\": 4,
                    \"summary\": \"The bell returns home and the harbor settles together.\",
                    \"emotional_intent\": \"Deliver repair and visible calm.\",
                },
            ],
            is_selected=True,
            accepted_at=now,
        )
        session.add(beat_sheet)
        session.flush()

        story_setup = StorySetup(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
            revision_number=1,
            target_word_count=1600,
            target_runtime_minutes=11,
            chapter_count=3,
            approximate_scene_count=9,
            chapter_style=\"three gentle chapters\",
            guidance_notes=\"End each chapter with a calmer image than it began.\",
            is_selected=True,
            accepted_at=now,
        )
        session.add(story_setup)
        session.flush()

        story_outline = StoryOutline(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
            story_setup_id=story_setup.id,
            revision_number=1,
            outline_kind=\"chapter\",
            summary=\"Three draftable chapters mapped from the beat sheet.\",
            cards=[
                {
                    \"card_key\": \"chapter-1\",
                    \"card_type\": \"chapter\",
                    \"position\": 1,
                    \"title\": \"Chapter 1: Opening Image to Catalyst\",
                    \"summary\": \"Set the moonlit harbor mood and launch Mira after the drifting bell.\",
                    \"beat_keys\": [\"opening_image\", \"catalyst\"],
                    \"beat_labels\": [\"Opening Image\", \"Catalyst\"],
                    \"emotional_shift\": \"Move from stillness toward gentle motion.\",
                    \"target_word_count\": 533,
                    \"target_runtime_minutes\": 4,
                    \"target_scene_count\": 3,
                    \"bedtime_guardrail\": \"Keep the problem small, visible, and quickly reassuring.\",
                },
                {
                    \"card_key\": \"chapter-2\",
                    \"card_type\": \"chapter\",
                    \"position\": 2,
                    \"title\": \"Chapter 2: Midpoint\",
                    \"summary\": \"Let Mira discover the hidden cove and feel the bell's meaning open up.\",
                    \"beat_keys\": [\"midpoint\"],
                    \"beat_labels\": [\"Midpoint\"],
                    \"emotional_shift\": \"Lift wonder without breaking the bedtime tone.\",
                    \"target_word_count\": 533,
                    \"target_runtime_minutes\": 4,
                    \"target_scene_count\": 3,
                    \"bedtime_guardrail\": \"Keep the reveal luminous and quickly reassuring.\",
                },
                {
                    \"card_key\": \"chapter-3\",
                    \"card_type\": \"chapter\",
                    \"position\": 3,
                    \"title\": \"Chapter 3: Finale\",
                    \"summary\": \"Guide the harbor back into rest.\",
                    \"beat_keys\": [\"finale\"],
                    \"beat_labels\": [\"Finale\"],
                    \"emotional_shift\": \"Turn gentle doubt into visible relief and belonging.\",
                    \"target_word_count\": 534,
                    \"target_runtime_minutes\": 3,
                    \"target_scene_count\": 3,
                    \"bedtime_guardrail\": \"Land in repair and sleepy calm.\",
                },
            ],
            metadata_json={
                \"genre_label\": genre.label,
                \"tone_label\": tone.label,
                \"target_word_count\": 1600,
            },
            is_selected=True,
            accepted_at=now,
        )
        session.add(story_outline)
        session.flush()

        service.update_stage_state(
            snapshot.id,
            stage=WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,
            status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,
        )
        composition_job = CompositionJob(
            session_id=snapshot.id,
            beat_sheet_id=beat_sheet.id,
            story_setup_id=story_setup.id,
            job_kind=CompositionJobKind.DRAFT,
            status=JobStatus.IN_PROGRESS,
            progress_percent=41.5,
            current_segment_index=2,
            started_at=now,
            metadata_json={
                \"accepted_story_so_far\": (
                    \"Mira padded past the moonlit docks while the harbor hummed in its sleep.\\n\\n\"
                    \"The bell's glow drifted deeper into the cove, asking her to come closer.\"
                ),
                \"latest_partial_output\": (
                    \"The bell's glow drifted deeper into the cove, asking her to come closer.\"
                ),
                \"latest_segment_summary\": (
                    \"Mira follows the bell deeper into the quiet harbor while the scene stays calm.\"
                ),
            },
        )
        session.add(composition_job)
        session.flush()
        session.commit()
        return snapshot.id, composition_job.id


pause_session_id, pause_job_id = create_story_session(\"Visual QA Pause Queued\")
with SessionLocal() as session:
    CompositionJobService(session).pause_job(pause_session_id, pause_job_id)
    hydration = SessionHydrationService(session).hydrate_session(
        pause_session_id,
        history_limit=10,
    )
    session.commit()
    print(
        f\"pause={pause_session_id}::{pause_job_id}::{hydration.snapshot.active_composition_job.interruption_request.message}\"
    )

redirect_session_id, redirect_job_id = create_story_session(\"Visual QA Redirect Queued\")
with SessionLocal() as session:
    CompositionJobService(session).request_redirect(
        redirect_session_id,
        redirect_job_id,
        instructions=\"Introduce the otter earlier and soften the midpoint into reassurance.\",
        rewrite_from_segment_index=2,
        origin=\"workspace\",
    )
    hydration = SessionHydrationService(session).hydrate_session(
        redirect_session_id,
        history_limit=10,
    )
    session.commit()
    print(
        f\"redirect={redirect_session_id}::{redirect_job_id}::{hydration.snapshot.active_composition_job.interruption_request.message}\"
    )
PY"
/bin/zsh -lc 'docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml exec -T backend alembic upgrade head'
